name: Pattern Group Inc.
summary: Overview Pattern is a global ecommerce acceleration platform that helps consumer brands sell products on global ecommerce marketplaces. Our proprietary technology and on-demand experts operate across more than 70 marketplaces to increase product sales to consumers in more than 100 countries.
